HGSS.360.0000:
There’s something written here.
Read it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.360.0001:
To my brothers and sisters:\f
We take pride in serving
Pokémon Trainers.\f
When Trainers talk to you, give them
something useful.\f
Love,
Monica\f
Keep reading? [0200,0000]
